message:
Merge PR #2751: fix: shell-quote agent args and respect role_agents model flags

Shell-quote args in BuildCommand to prevent glob expansion in tmux, and fix
start command resolution to respect model flags from role_agents config.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2751
Author: aphexcx
